summary: v0.26 WS-event protocol regression — remote gen completes but app hangs. Root-caused live: progress->progress_state, executing-null->execution_success. Floor-blocker for MPI-139.

Fix verified on LOCAL v0.26 — LTX gen settles clean (card resolves, clock stops). Root cause: commandExecutor exec.onComplete only fired on dropped executing-null sentinel; now also on execution_success. Remote pending v0.9.1 Pod build.
